summary: Frontend testing complete for Admin Ticket Management and Data Validation features. All 5 requested features tested and verified working correctly.

issues: Warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement needed

passed_tests: Admin Ticket Management: Demo Admin login redirects to /admin
Admin Ticket Management: Navigate to /admin/tickets shows ticket list with 2 tickets
Admin Ticket Management: Click on ticket row opens detail modal with user message
Admin Ticket Management: Reply textarea present and functional
Admin Ticket Management: Send reply button works - 'Balasan berhasil dikirim' toast shown
Admin Ticket Management: Admin reply displayed in ticket detail with timestamp
Data Validation - Patient: Submit empty form shows 'Nama pasien wajib diisi' error
Data Validation - Patient: Submit empty form shows 'Nomor RM wajib diisi' error
Data Validation - Patient: Error toast appears with first validation error
Data Validation - Patient: Input fields get red border when validation fails
Create Patient: Valid data submission works - 'Pasien berhasil ditambahkan' toast shown
Create Patient: Patient count increased from 2 to 3 after adding
Data Validation - Support Ticket: Submit empty form shows 'Subjek wajib diisi' error
Data Validation - Support Ticket: Submit empty form shows 'Pesan wajib diisi' error
Data Validation - Support Ticket: Error toast appears with first validation error
Create Support Ticket: Valid data submission works - 'Tiket berhasil dikirim' toast shown
Create Support Ticket: New ticket appears in list with 'Menunggu' status
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: DialogContent components missing aria-describedby for accessibility (non-blocking)

test_credentials.demo_admin: Click 'Demo Admin' button on login page (admin@demo.com/password)
test_credentials.demo_user: Click 'Demo User' button on login page (user@demo.com/password)

seed_data_creation: Created test patient 'Test Pasien Baru' with RM-TEST-001 and support ticket 'Test Subjek Tiket Support'
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Admin Ticket Management and Data Validation features are working correctly. Admin can view tickets, open detail modal, and reply to tickets. Patient and Support Ticket forms have proper validation with error messages showing inline and in toast. Valid data submission works for both Patient and Support Ticket creation.

features_verified.admin_ticket_management_reply: PASS - Reply textarea and send button work

features_verified.patient_create_valid: PASS - Valid data creates patient successfully
features_verified.support_ticket_validation_empty: PASS - Shows 'Subjek wajib diisi' and 'Pesan wajib diisi'
